fields.description:
## Description
LOC/size analyzer that shells to `scc --format json` (deterministic, no network), populating `AnalyzerResult.loc` (per-file/per-language LOC + max). Absent scc -> Unavailable (honest), never fabricated zeros.

## Review-driven corrections
- REUSE the existing scc `--format json` shell-out + parser: `src/rebar/grounding/engine_b_backends.py` (`_metric_invoke` / `_scc_files`) already invokes `[binary, "--format", "json", repo_root]` and normalizes per-file LOC — extract/share that rather than reinvent.
- Live in the NEW `src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/` package (not the quarantined `adapters/`).
- Absent tool must yield `Unavailable(reason, accruing_since)` (the reused sentinel) — note the grounding `measure_tree`/`_metric_invoke` precedent returns None/abstains, so map that to Unavailable here.
- Deps are SIBLING stories, not children: needs interface 3b30 + config e7a0 (scan roots) + extra 9597 packaging.

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] `analyzers/scc_loc.py` runs scc over the configured scan root, parses JSON -> per-file/per-language LOC + max_loc; reuses the grounding scc seam.
- [ ] scc absent / non-zero exit -> Unavailable(reason, accruing_since), not a crash and not zeros.
- [ ] Deterministic; language-agnostic (multiple languages).

## Verification
- [ ] Unit with a monkeypatched runner seam (no scc needed in CI); integration test skipped if scc absent.

## Dependencies: 3b30, 9597, e7a0 (siblings). Recorded edges: depends_on 9597, e7a0 (transitively 3b30).
## Files likely touched: src/rebar/metrics/analyzers/scc_loc.py (new), src/rebar/grounding/engine_b_backends.py (extract shared scc parse), tests/unit/metrics/test_scc_loc.py (new)
## Estimated scope: M
